changelog:
v1.0.1 — fix: hide-from-users now uses freshly-tracked User entities so per-user policy preferences actually persist; auto-runs the hide on every plugin startup so the library stays hidden across upgrades / restarts.

v1.0.0 — first stable release.

Features:
- Folder-based source — no Jellyfin library required (auto-creates a hidden internal one)
- Movies AND TV episodes (web-client patch via FileTransformation)
- Multiple preroll folders + per-folder default tags
- Sidecar metadata (.json next to each video) or folder-level prerolls.json: tags, weight, rating, schedule
- Schedules: month / day-of-week / hour / MM-DD..MM-DD date ranges (seasonal prerolls)
- Per-library and per-content-type rules with require/exclude tags
- Per-user inclusion/exclusion (admin-only, kid-only, etc.)
- Maturity gating (preroll rating must not exceed feature)
- Cooldown per item (don't replay same preroll on rewatch)
- Skip-on-resume
- Session modes: every playback / first of session / once per day / first of binge
- Series-specific prerolls (theme-preroll.mp4 in series folder)
- Trailer mode (chain local trailers before features)
- Skippable preroll button overlay with min-seconds delay
- 5 selection modes: Random, Sequential, Weighted, Equal Rotation, Recency Boost
- Stats dashboard (per-file + per-user playback counts)
- Preview-in-browser modal
- Configuration validation
- Custom designed dark admin UI
description: Plays preroll videos before movies and TV episodes. Folder-based — no Jellyfin library required.
name: Projectionist
overview: Folder-based prerolls with episode support, schedules, library rules, and rich smart-selection.
